horoscope: You're seeking a better balance inside and out, dear Aries, and you owe it to yourself to go there. Transits today point you in the direction of growth and improvement, but they also pull your attention to unresolved past matters. You're learning to let go of unnecessary worry and guilt or to put your faith in a larger plan. In the process, you may be healing, letting go, and forgiving something from the past. Further information about a private or past topic may surface, giving you a refreshing new perspective today. You’re sensitive and responsive, and it’s easy to smooth over differences with others if needed. You may not know the whole story yet, but filling in a few blanks feels good. You tend to allow social elements to distract you today! It’s also possible that the re-emergence of a person from your history sparks all sorts of memories.

Friendships, networks, and group connections tend to bring up learning experiences and opportunities to grow and improve now, dear Taurus. They can also pull you to the past. You're inclined to examine feelings today. New information about old matters can come to light, particularly about long-term projects or friends. A project or idea that you had abandoned or set aside can seem viable again. While this may be true, do watch for a tendency to glamorize the past. It's also possible someone from the past reappears. Transits now encourage you to see a frustrating problem in a new light. Conversations can be quite lighthearted, but watch for a tendency to pay superficial attention to a matter that may deserve a more in-depth approach.

This is a potentially strong day for both technique and inspiration, dear Gemini. You may be reconnecting with old ideas and projects that can help you better manage the present. It's time to polish and refine those projects already in progress, with a sharp eye on the future. Agreements with a partner or significant other can happen quite naturally, even after recent disagreements. It can be a time for enjoying pleasant thoughts or conversations. You're likely to receive more attention than usual today, particularly on a professional or public level. Your words have a lot of impact, but misunderstandings are also possible. As long as you choose your words carefully, this can be an excellent time to bring peace and harmony to a matter.

The Moon continues its transit of your sign, highlighting your emotions, dear Cancer, but then moves into your resources sector. You’re ready to turn your attention to the practical side of your life. Still, smoothing over differences can be in focus. You’re presenting yourself and your ideas with charm or gentleness, and it works well for you. Influences highlight the need to put old habits behind you. Positive shifts are occurring now, and you are more willing than usual to let go of things that have kept you from exploring new subjects or places. It’s a time to break out of past patterns, yet Mercury’s retrograde also encourages you to take care of unfinished business. Looking at past subjects, relationships, or viewpoints in new ways can be stimulating. You may be making clarifications and possibly coming to new conclusions about past matters that help you find resolutions or closure.

Conversations tend to lead in good directions today, dear Leo, although they're inclined to focus on past matters. Your powers of negotiation are good, but with Mercury retrograde, misunderstandings or inconclusive situations can be part of the picture. You're inclined to do a lot of analyzing, thinking, and talking about a personal or intimate matter, and if jealousies emerge, use the experience as a lesson in self-awareness. You're recognizing your attachments and perhaps embracing those that are healthy for you while considering elements of your present and past that need to go. There is a strong tendency to consider the consequences of recent choices or missed opportunities, and this gives you a new perspective on how to go about things in the future. There can be attractive business projects or plans re-emerging from the past.

With the Moon moving into the sign just behind yours, dear Virgo, you begin to crave and need downtime today. Still, relationships are again in strong focus, and it’s a positive period for learning about and through them. There may be experiences now that alert you to the need to learn, grow, and improve while exploring and discovering relationship needs. Strong forces are challenging you to move out of your comfort zone so that you can move forward, while a focus on the past is just as vital with Mercury’s recent retrograde turn. Through partnership or cooperation with others, you’ll get to the inner balance necessary to achieve your personal goals. You’re likely to see what has held you back from sharing yourself with others in healthy ways or forming close alliances. You may stumble upon or uncover something missing, lost, or hidden today. You want to make sense of feelings and ideas. Reaching agreements, or at least getting to a place of understanding, can be in pleasant focus.

This can be a good time for connecting with situations, people, or ideas that help you improve your habits, work, or health, dear Libra. With Mercury retrograde in your solar sixth house and the North Node in the same areas, the result can be a somewhat odd energy as forces seem to pull you to the past and encourage you forward. Still, it's favorable energy for understanding the past and preparing for the future. Improvements may involve honoring, developing, or refining routines, or drawing more explicit boundaries between work and rest to your benefit. While you're looking forward to a brighter future, you are also looking to the past for answers and solutions. You’re gaining perspective today. Efforts toward making peace can be in focus and successful. You’re making sense of your feelings and perhaps even an old problem as you see things in a new light. Someone from your past can be on your mind or perhaps reappear in your life.

Although Mercury is retrograde and you are experiencing some level of reserve as a result, dear Scorpio, you are encouraged to take some creative risks and express yourself more spontaneously. You may be making the right connections to further your growth in this regard. The past may have answers. In fact, you may bump into someone from your romantic past or an old friend, and this experience can, in some way, help you move forward. You're inclined to figure things out and come to a mutually beneficial agreement. While it may not stick forever, it’s probably just what you need now. You might also get to solve a mystery about a relationship. Talks and thoughts revolve around past romance, projects, and events, or an overdue conversation happens.

You might enjoy discussing personal plans, even if you are not very clear on the details today, dear Sagittarius. You could find yourself in a favorable position to satisfy your needs for conversation or learning experiences. Avoid jumping to conclusions, as some facts may be missing. However, conversations with or about family can be revealing and rewarding. You may be directing a lot of attention to unresolved relationship matters. It's a time to be fair and nonjudgmental, and to see an issue that once bothered you in a more favorable light. There can be plenty of nostalgia now. You have an open mind and an open heart right now, so that new information coming in can expand your perspective. There is more faith in your emotional life and ability to grow.

Even though Mercury's retrograde in your communications sector can point to some problems getting the right message across, dear Capricorn, improving and refining your communications, projects, and knowledge are especially important to you right now. Your popularity can soar today primarily surrounding your ideas, skills, and knowledge, or the ways you communicate and connect. You're making connections with people and information that further your learning and networking opportunities, and there can be some nice gems to be found by going over, reviewing, and editing old projects. Today can be about discovering some missing puzzle pieces to a situation. Even though the complete picture is yet to come, it can still be satisfying! Thoughts and conversations tend to revolve around sorting out past problems, particularly old relationship challenges. The social side of things is distracting today, but mostly pleasantly so.

You're in a good position for connecting with information or helpful people who can lead to a boost in your finances today, dear Aquarius. You may be looking to the past for answers. In fact, in the process, you could discover a valuable resource you hadn't noticed before. You are learning about what you truly value, and it's a good time to review how you're managing your resources. Even with Mercury retrograde, there can be a healthy flow and understanding with someone special today. Further information about a long-standing issue may emerge and alter your perspective, particularly related to your finances or practical affairs. There could be a project or financial opportunity that you previously set aside that now looks promising.

You're working on trusting your own instincts, dear Pisces, and you might make connections that point you in the right direction. This can be with a person, information, or through a sudden realization. You're developing and nurturing your independent spirit. Today's energies are strong for putting everything into perspective rather than sweating the small stuff. Pleasing conversations can be part of the picture. Energies feel rather easygoing, but it's a good idea to be more mindful of what you say, as it may not always come out as you intend. There can be more attention and focus on you than usual, and you might be the subject of conversation. Today can be a time for attracting people from your past.
